languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy, if it will dispel your doubts about my colleague." {n}He connects the skull to the data-slate and announces:{/n} "Access to the logs has been granted."

languages.text: {n}Помедлив, Эоганн ворчит:{/n} "Я готов на это грубое нарушение привилегии приватности, если это развеет ваши сомнения насчет моего коллеги". {n}Он подключает череп к инфопластине и произносит:{/n} "Доступ к логам санкционирован".

{n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy, if it will dispel your doubts about my colleague." {n}He connects the skull to the data-slate and announces:{/n} "Access to the logs has been granted."
languages.original_text: {n}Помедлив, Эоганн ворчит:{/n} "Я готов на это грубое нарушение привилегии приватности, если это развеет ваши сомнения насчет моего коллеги". {n}Он подключает череп к инфопластине и произносит:{/n} "Доступ к логам санкционирован".

traits.locale_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy, if it will dispel your doubts about my colleague." {n}He connects the skull to the data-slate and announces:{/n} "Access to the logs has been granted."

{n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy, if it will dispel your doubts about my colleague." {n}He connects the skull to the data-slate and announces:{/n} "Access to the logs has been granted."

{n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy, if it will dispel your doubts about my colleague." {n}He connects the skull to the data-slate and announces:{/n} "Access to the logs has been granted."

languages.text: {n}Tras un momento de duda, Eogunn farfulla:{/n} «Estoy dispuesto a aceptar esta brutal violación de privacidad si así aplaca sus dudas sobre mi colega». {n}Conecta el cráneo a la tablilla de datos y anuncia:{/n} «Acceso a los registros concedido».
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy, if it will dispel your doubts about my colleague." {n}He connects the skull to the data-slate and announces:{/n} "Access to the logs has been granted."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras un momento de duda, Eogunn farfulla:{/n} «Estoy dispuesto a aceptar esta brutal violación de privacidad si así aplaca sus dudas sobre mi colega». {n}Conecta el cráneo a la tablilla de datos y anuncia:{/n} «Acceso a los registros concedido».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡犹豫了片刻，然后嘟囔道：{/n}“如果这能打消您对我这位同僚的疑虑，我愿意忍受这种严重侵犯隐私的行为。”{n}他将头骨连接到数据板，随后大声宣告：{/n}“日志访问权限已开启。”
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy, if it will dispel your doubts about my colleague." {n}He connects the skull to the data-slate and announces:{/n} "Access to the logs has been granted."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡犹豫了片刻，然后嘟囔道：{/n}“如果这能打消您对我这位同僚的疑虑，我愿意忍受这种严重侵犯隐私的行为。”{n}他将头骨连接到数据板，随后大声宣告：{/n}“日志访问权限已开启。”

languages.text: {n}Après quelques instants d'hésitation, Eogunn marmonne :{/n} « Je me soumets à cette flagrante atteinte à ma vie privée si cela peut dissiper vos doutes quant à mon collègue. » {n}Il connecte le crâne à la plaque de données et déclare :{/n} « Accès aux journaux accordé. »
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy, if it will dispel your doubts about my colleague." {n}He connects the skull to the data-slate and announces:{/n} "Access to the logs has been granted."

traits.locale_text: {n}Après quelques instants d'hésitation, Eogunn marmonne :{/n} « Je me soumets à cette flagrante atteinte à ma vie privée si cela peut dissiper vos doutes quant à mon collègue. » {n}Il connecte le crâne à la plaque de données et déclare :{/n} « Accès aux journaux accordé. »

languages.text: {n}Nach einem kurzen Zögern murmelt Eogunn:{/n} "Ich bin bereit, diese unerhörte Störung der Privatsphäre zu erdulden, wenn es Eure Zweifel hinsichtlich meines Kollegen zerstreut." {n}Er verbindet den Schädel mit dem Datablock und verkündet:{/n} "Zugriff auf die Protokolle gewährt."
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy, if it will dispel your doubts about my colleague." {n}He connects the skull to the data-slate and announces:{/n} "Access to the logs has been granted."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach einem kurzen Zögern murmelt Eogunn:{/n} "Ich bin bereit, diese unerhörte Störung der Privatsphäre zu erdulden, wenn es Eure Zweifel hinsichtlich meines Kollegen zerstreut." {n}Er verbindet den Schädel mit dem Datablock und verkündet:{/n} "Zugriff auf die Protokolle gewährt."

languages.text: {n}一瞬の逡巡の後、エオガンは不機嫌そうに言った。{/n}「私の同僚に対する疑念が払拭されるのであれば、このような重大なプライバシー侵害を受けても構いません」{n}彼は頭蓋骨をデータスレートに接続し、こう告げた：{/n}「ログへのアクセスが許可されました。」
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy, if it will dispel your doubts about my colleague." {n}He connects the skull to the data-slate and announces:{/n} "Access to the logs has been granted."

traits.locale_text: {n}一瞬の逡巡の後、エオガンは不機嫌そうに言った。{/n}「私の同僚に対する疑念が払拭されるのであれば、このような重大なプライバシー侵害を受けても構いません」{n}彼は頭蓋骨をデータスレートに接続し、こう告げた：{/n}「ログへのアクセスが許可されました。」

languages.text: {n}Bir anlık tereddüdün ardından Eogunn homurdanıyor.{/n} "Meslektaşımla ilgili şüphelerinizi giderecekse bu büyük gizlilik ihlaline katlanmaya razıyım. {n}Kafatasını databelaya bağlayıp konuşmaya devam ediyor.{/n}Kayıtlara erişim izni verildi."
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment's hesitation, Eogunn grumbles,{/n} "I am willing to suffer this gross violation of privacy, if it will dispel your doubts about my colleague." {n}He connects the skull to the data-slate and announces:{/n} "Access to the logs has been granted."
